faqs.question: Are these online tools really free?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our tools are 100% free with no hidden costs, premium tiers, or credit card requirements. You get full access to every feature without any limitations.

faqs.question: Do I need to create an account to use these tools?
faqs.answer: No account needed. All tools work instantly without sign-ups, registrations, or email verification. Just open the tool and start using it immediately.

faqs.question: Are my files safe when using these online tools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All files are processed locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and security. We don't upload, store, or access your data.

faqs.question: Can I use these tools offline?
faqs.answer: Yes, once the page loads, most tools work without internet connection. Your browser handles all processing locally, so you can use tools anywhere.

faqs.question: What types of tools are available?
faqs.answer: We offer 7+ tools across 4 categories: Image Tools (resize, compress), PDF Tools (merge, split), Text Tools (word counter, case converter), and Developer Tools (JSON formatter, validators).

faqs.question: How do I resize an image to exactly 20KB or 50KB?
faqs.answer: Upload your image, select your target size (20KB, 50KB, or 100KB), and our tool automatically compresses it to that exact size while maintaining quality. Download the result instantly.

faqs.question: Does resizing reduce image quality?
faqs.answer: Our smart compression minimizes quality loss. While some reduction is necessary to achieve smaller file sizes, our algorithm preserves visual clarity better than standard compression methods.

faqs.question: What image formats are supported?
faqs.answer: We support JPG, PNG, and WebP formats. JPG works best for photos, PNG for graphics with transparency, and WebP for superior compression with modern browser support.

faqs.question: Can I resize multiple images at once?
faqs.answer: Currently, our tool processes one image at a time for optimal quality. Batch processing is coming soon. For now, you can resize images sequentially in seconds.

faqs.question: Will my images be uploaded to your servers?
faqs.answer: No. All image processing happens in your browser. Your images never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy and security. No uploads, no storage, no data collection.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on PDF file size when merging?
faqs.answer: No size limits. Merge PDFs of any size without restrictions. Our tool handles large files efficiently in your browser, processing hundreds of pages without issues.

faqs.question: Can I merge password-protected PDFs?
faqs.answer: PDFs must be unlocked before merging. Remove password protection first, then merge your documents. This ensures proper processing and maintains document integrity.

faqs.question: Will the merged PDF have watermarks?
faqs.answer: No watermarks ever. Unlike many free PDF tools, we never add branding or watermarks to your documents. Your merged PDFs remain clean and professional.

faqs.question: How many PDFs can I merge at once?
faqs.answer: No limit on the number of PDFs. Merge 2, 10, or 100+ documents in a single operation. Performance depends on your device capabilities and total file size.

faqs.question: Are my PDFs stored on your servers?
faqs.answer: No. All PDF processing happens in your browser. Your documents never leave your device, ensuring complete privacy for sensitive business and personal files.

faqs.question: How accurate is the word count?
faqs.answer: Extremely accurate. We use standard word counting algorithms that match Microsoft Word and Google Docs. Words are counted by spaces, following industry-standard methods.

faqs.question: Does punctuation count as characters?
faqs.answer: Yes. Punctuation marks, numbers, and symbols all count as characters. We show both character counts with and without spaces for flexibility across different platforms.

faqs.question: What's a good average sentence length?
faqs.answer: 15-20 words per sentence is ideal for readability. Shorter sentences improve comprehension, especially for online content. Vary sentence length to maintain reader interest.

faqs.question: How do I reduce word count without losing meaning?
faqs.answer: Remove filler words (very, really, just), use active voice instead of passive, eliminate redundancies, and replace phrases with single words. Focus on clarity and conciseness.

faqs.question: Can I check word count for multiple documents?
faqs.answer: Process one document at a time for accurate results. Clear the text area and paste new content to check different documents sequentially. Results update instantly.

faqs.question: What's the difference between title case and sentence case?
faqs.answer: Title case capitalizes the first letter of most words (excluding articles and short prepositions). Sentence case only capitalizes the first word of sentences and proper nouns.

faqs.question: How should I handle acronyms in title case?
faqs.answer: Keep acronyms in all caps (NASA, FBI, HTML). They're proper nouns and should maintain their standard formatting regardless of the surrounding text case.

faqs.question: Can I convert text with special characters?
faqs.answer: Yes. Special characters, numbers, and punctuation remain unchanged. Only letters are converted between cases. Emojis and symbols are preserved exactly as entered.

faqs.question: Is there a character limit for conversion?
faqs.answer: No character limit. Convert single words or entire documents instantly. Our tool handles any text length efficiently in your browser without performance issues.

faqs.question: Will this tool remove all spaces from my text?
faqs.answer: No. It removes only extra spaces, keeping single spaces between words. Your text remains readable and properly formatted with correct spacing.

faqs.question: Can I keep paragraph breaks while removing extra spaces?
faqs.answer: Yes. Choose to preserve line breaks while removing extra spaces. This maintains your document structure while cleaning up formatting issues.

faqs.question: Does it work with tab characters?
faqs.answer: Yes. Optionally convert tabs to spaces or remove them entirely. Standardize whitespace across your document for consistent formatting.

faqs.question: How do I clean text copied from PDFs?
faqs.answer: Copy text from your PDF, paste it into our tool, and click clean. Extra spaces and formatting issues from PDF extraction are removed instantly.

faqs.question: Do spaces count as characters?
faqs.answer: It depends on the platform. Twitter, SMS, and most social media count spaces as characters. Our tool shows both counts (with and without spaces) for flexibility.

faqs.question: How are emojis counted?
faqs.answer: Emojis typically count as 2 characters, but complex emojis may count as more. Test on the actual platform to be sure, as counting methods vary.

faqs.question: What's the difference between character count and word count?
faqs.answer: Word count tracks words separated by spaces. Character count tracks every letter, number, space, and punctuation mark. Different platforms use different metrics.

faqs.question: Can I check multiple texts at once?
faqs.answer: Process one text at a time for accurate results. Clear the text area and paste new content to check different texts sequentially. Counts update in real-time.

faqs.question: What's the difference between format and minify?
faqs.answer: Format adds indentation and line breaks for readability. Minify removes all whitespace to reduce file size. Use format for development, minify for production.

faqs.question: How do I fix common JSON syntax errors?
faqs.answer: Check for missing commas between properties, ensure keys are in double quotes, remove trailing commas (not allowed in JSON), and verify all brackets and braces match.

faqs.question: Can it handle large JSON files?
faqs.answer: Yes. Process JSON files with thousands of lines. Performance depends on your device, but most files format instantly without issues.

faqs.question: Does it support JSON5 or JSONC?
faqs.answer: Currently supports standard JSON only. JSON5 features like comments and trailing commas will show as syntax errors. Use standard JSON format for validation.
